title: Aave, Solana ecosystem tokens lead crypto rebound as bitcoin steadies near $60,000
summary: Tokenized stock trading fueled fresh momentum across the Solana ecosystem, while Aave founder hinted at token buybacks coming under new framework.

title: U.S. House Democrat, who may soon run key committee, condemns crypto in 401(k)s
summary: Maxine Waters, the ranking Democrat on House Financial Services, asked the chief of the Department of Labor to withdraw its proposal on alternative assets.

title: Former Ethereum Foundation leader warns of funding gap as governance shifts
summary: A former Ethereum Foundation member says the network must quickly build new funding institutions as the Foundation steps back.

title: Anti-trafficking group says Clarity Act's Section 604 could weaken accountability
summary: An anti-human trafficking advocate said a Clarity Act provision could weaken accountability despite existing criminal laws.

title: Virtuals' Jansen Teng says AI agents are evolving into autonomous economic actors
summary: The next phase of AI agents may be less about chat and more about earning, spending and coordinating.
